channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Uber adds temporary 5c per kilometre fuel surcharge for petrol, diesel and hybrid vehicles from 15 April
item.description: Uber Australia has announced a temporary fuel surcharge that will increase fares for passengers starting from 15 April. The 5 cents per kilometre fee will apply to trips in petrol, diesel and hybrid v...

item.title: Filipino Girl Group BINI Receives Warm Reception at Coachella
item.description: Filipino pop group BINI made waves at the 2026 Coachella music festival, prompting an outpouring of admiration from fans on Reddit. Many Reddit users shared heartfelt reactions, describing their emoti...

item.title: Budapest Celebrates Opposition Victory Ending Orban’s 16-Year Rule
item.description: Budapest erupted in celebrations as the opposition Tisza party secured a decisive victory in Sunday’s pivotal election, bringing an end to Viktor Orban’s 16-year tenure as Hungary’s right-wing prime m...

item.title: Nigerian Military Conducts Air Strikes Against Terrorists in Borno
item.description: The Nigerian military recently conducted an air strike operation in Borno State, aimed at disrupting activities of terrorist groups operating in the region. The operation follows increased reports of ...

item.title: IRGC Warns Against Military Movement Near Hormuz Amid US-Iran Ceasefire
item.description: Following the recent US announcement of a blockade on the Strait of Hormuz, tensions have escalated between Washington and Tehran. Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) stated that any mili...

item.title: Monash IVF receives improved 90-cent takeover offer from Washington H. Soul Pattinson and Genesis Capital consortium
item.description: Monash IVF, a pioneering Australian reproductive healthcare company, is assessing an improved takeover proposal from a consortium led by Washington H. Soul Pattinson and Genesis Capital Investment Man...

item.title: Toronto Raptors Secure Fifth Seed in Eastern Conference Playoffs
item.description: The Toronto Raptors have officially secured a spot in the NBA playoffs following a decisive 136-101 victory over the Brooklyn Nets on April 12, 2026. Scottie Barnes led the team with his third triple-...

item.title: Geordin Hill-Lewis elected DA leader, outlines plans for government and policy reforms
item.description: Geordin Hill-Lewis, aged 39 and known for his moderate and conciliatory approach, has won a decisive victory at the Democratic Alliance's federal conference. As the new leader, he plans to leverage hi...

item.title: Kenyan volleyball teams Pipeline, KCB and DCI set to compete for Women’s African Clubs Championship in Cairo
item.description: Kenya’s top women’s volleyball clubs have started their campaign in the Women’s African Clubs Championship taking place in Cairo, Egypt. The tournament kicked off last evening with 24 teams from 14 co...

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins second consecutive Masters and eyes further major victories
item.description: Rory McIlroy has successfully defended his Masters title at Augusta National, securing a one-shot victory over world number one Scottie Scheffler and taking his career total to six major wins. At 36, ...

item.title: Liberals poised to secure majority government through by-elections and floor crossings
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s Liberal government is on the verge of achieving a majority in the House of Commons following Monday’s by-elections in Toronto and Quebec. The party currently holds 171 sea...

item.title: Standard Bank reports solid growth in Easter consumer spending
item.description: Standard Bank has reported a significant increase in consumer spending over the Easter 2026 period, indicating resilience in household demand and a continued shift towards digital payments. Data from ...

item.title: Questions over Taiwo Oyedele's tax reform comments and official clarifications
item.description: The article highlights ongoing scrutiny on Minister of State for Finance, Taiwo Oyedele, concerning his public statements about Nigeria’s tax reform programme. At a recent Nigerian Bar Association con...

item.title: Alchemy in Surry Hills: A Polish Café Serving Exceptional Karpatka for Nearly 20 Years
item.description: Alchemy, a long-standing Polish café in Surry Hills, Sydney, has been quietly serving some of the city’s finest traditional dishes for nearly two decades. Owned by Polish-born couple Halina and Janusz...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs extend unbeaten run with 2–0 win over TS Galaxy
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs secured their fourth consecutive league victory of the season with a commanding 2–0 win over TS Galaxy at FNB Stadium, despite challenging weather conditions and a temporary power outage...

item.title: Vanguard Awards 2026: Tuface, Laolu Gbenjo to Entertain at Prestigious Ceremony
item.description: The Vanguard Personality of the Year Award is set to hold on April 24, 2026, at Eko Hotels and Suites, Lagos, and promises a night of glamour, recognition, and top-tier entertainment. This year's edit...

item.title: Lagos Police Confirm Death of Suspected Buccaneer Member Adedipe Adeyinkan in Iponri Bridge Shooting
item.description: My people, the Lagos State Police Command don confirm the killing of one Adedipe Adeyinkan, wey dem dey call “Agali,” wey be suspected member of the Buccaneer Confraternity, also known as Brothers Acr...

item.title: Sixteen arrested in Bulacan for illegal online cockfighting operation
item.description: Sixteen individuals were apprehended in connection with an illegal online cockfighting operation, commonly known as 'sabong,' in San Ildefonso, Bulacan. According to Brigadier General Jess Mendez, Cen...

item.title: Bangladesh’s New Government to Send Delegation to China in Effort to Strengthen Bilateral Relations
item.description: The newly elected government of Bangladesh, led by Prime Minister Tarique Rahman, has announced its first official engagement with China through a 20-member delegation scheduled to visit Beijing from ...

item.title: Philippine authorities confirm cyanide on Chinese vessels near BRP Sierra Madre
item.description: The National Security Council (NSC) confirmed that bottles containing cyanide were recovered from Chinese boats operating near the BRP Sierra Madre in Ayungin Shoal. The Philippine Navy retrieved the ...
